supply_chain.dependencies: Third parties provide key components of business operations such as data processing, recording and monitoring transactions, online banking interfaces and services, Internet connections and network access
risks: Disruptions in services provided by vendors
Failure to comply with applicable laws and regulations
Fraud or misconduct on the part of employees of vendors
Issues at third-party vendors to the vendors
Failure of vendors to handle current or higher volumes
Failure of vendors to provide services for any reason
Financial or operational difficulties for vendors

regulatory_risks: Prompt corrective action requirements under FDIA
Long-term debt requirements proposed for banking organizations with $100 billion or more in total assets
Basel III Endgame - New rules for capital requirements with broad-based changes to risk-weighting framework
CIRCIA requiring covered entities to report significant cyber incidents to CISA
State regulatory requirements across multiple jurisdictions
Dodd-Frank Act compliance requirements
Compensation practice oversight and limitations by Federal Reserve and FDIC
Resolution planning requirements for IDIs with $50 billion or more in total assets
HUD regulatory guidelines for mortgage operations
Stress Capital Buffer (SCB) requirements based on supervisory stress testing
Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) regulations
SEC regulations requiring disclosure of material cybersecurity incidents
OFAC sanctions compliance requirements
Potential changes to tax laws affecting financial institutions
Consumer protection laws including Equal Credit Opportunity Act, Fair Credit Reporting Act, Truth in Lending Act, Home Mortgage Disclosure Act
Fair lending and consumer protection laws
Enhanced liquidity risk management and risk committee requirements for Category IV firms
Volcker Rule prohibiting proprietary trading and investing in hedge funds or private equity funds
Privacy and cybersecurity laws including GLBA, CCPA, state data breach notification laws
Cybersecurity notification rule requiring 36-hour incident reporting to primary federal regulator
CRA final rule materially revising current framework including assessment areas, evaluation tests, and data collection requirements
FDIC insurance assessment changes
Potential regulatory actions or enforcement proceedings
FDIC Part 370 recordkeeping requirements for rapid payment of insured deposits
Changes in federal and state banking regulations
Federal Reserve proposal to lower maximum interchange fee for large debit card issuers
Clean holding company requirements that would limit or prohibit certain transactions
Changes in laws and regulations affecting banking businesses including debit card interchange fees, special FDIC assessments, new long-term debt requirements
Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac regulatory requirements
Changes resulting from changes in U.S. presidential administration, control of U.S. Congress, and changes in personnel at bank regulatory agencies
CFPB rules on overdraft fees scheduled to take effect October 1, 2025
Anti-money laundering (AML) and Bank Secrecy Act (BSA) compliance
Enhanced prudential standards and regulatory tailoring rules for BHCs with over $100 billion in assets
Basel III capital requirements and potential Basel IV implementation
Community Reinvestment Act (CRA) requirements and ratings
Federal Reserve stress testing and capital planning requirements
Climate-related disclosure requirements
Anti-Money Laundering Act (AMLA) amendments to BSA requiring risk-based approach
Data privacy and cybersecurity regulations

sanction_risks: Territorial sanctions restricting trade with or investment in sanctioned countries
Blocking of assets where government or specially designated nationals of sanctioned country have an interest
OFAC sanctions compliance - U.S. economic sanctions affecting transactions with designated foreign countries, nationals, organizations, regimes and entities
Failure to comply with sanctions could have serious legal and reputational consequences
Specially Designated Nationals and Blocked Persons List compliance
